title: agrostis schultesii
intro: Agrostis schultesii, also known as alpine bent grass or Schultes' bent grass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved digestion, as well as potential antioxidant and antiviral effects. Agrostis schultesii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
